# Audit Hardening Fixture Index

This index lists planned audit-hardening fixtures. `TBD` paths are intentional:
the binary payloads and sidecar generators will be added by later test tasks.
Do not add raw `*.bin` fixtures without a matching generator or validator that
cites the OPC UA sections used to derive the bytes.

## Malformed-Array Fixture Index

Purpose: track the planned array-boundary and malformed-array fixtures needed to
prove OPC UA Binary array handling before payload bytes exist. This section
supports FR-001, FR-003, and FR-020 from `specs/020-audit-hardening/spec.md` and
the target tests listed in `docs/traceability/020-audit-hardening.md`.

Primary citations:

- OPC-10000-6 section 5.2 Binary encoding.
- OPC-10000-6 section 5.2.5 Arrays.
- OPC-10000-4 section 7.38.2 Common StatusCodes.

| Category | Planned fixture path | Purpose | Expected behavior / StatusCode | Related FRs | Target tests / tasks | OPC UA citations |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Null-array sentinel | TBD: `tests/fixtures/audit-hardening/malformed-array/null-array-sentinel.bin` | Preserve the valid `-1` array-length sentinel as distinct from malformed negative counts. | Valid control: decode as a null array; no `Bad_DecodingError`. | FR-001, FR-020 | T010a, T011a; later binary reader regression coverage. | OPC-10000-6 section 5.2.5 Arrays. |
| Empty-array boundary | TBD: `tests/fixtures/audit-hardening/malformed-array/empty-array.bin` | Preserve the valid zero-length array boundary. | Valid control: decode as an empty array; no error StatusCode. | FR-001, FR-020 | T010b; later binary reader regression coverage. | OPC-10000-6 section 5.2.5 Arrays. |
| Positive-count control | TBD: `tests/fixtures/audit-hardening/malformed-array/positive-count-complete.bin` | Preserve a complete positive-count array fixture for RED/GREEN contrast with malformed lengths. | Valid control: decode the declared element count and consume only the encoded element bytes. | FR-001, FR-003, FR-020 | T010c; later binary reader regression coverage. | OPC-10000-6 section 5.2 Binary encoding; OPC-10000-6 section 5.2.5 Arrays. |
| Count below null sentinel | TBD: `tests/fixtures/audit-hardening/malformed-array/count-below-minus-one.bin` | Prove counts such as `-2` or lower are never treated as null or empty arrays. | Reject with `Bad_DecodingError` (`0x80070000`); decoder status remains failed and no service state changes. | FR-001, FR-020 | T010d, T011b, T022a; service examples T024a and T024c. | OPC-10000-6 section 5.2.5 Arrays; OPC-10000-4 section 7.38.2 Common StatusCodes. |
| Truncated element payload | TBD: `tests/fixtures/audit-hardening/malformed-array/declared-count-truncated-elements.bin` | Prove a positive count cannot read past the remaining message body when element bytes are missing. | Reject with `Bad_DecodingError`; no out-of-bounds read, skip, storage alias, callback, or state mutation. | FR-003, FR-020 | T022b, T015b; binary type boundary coverage in T087d and T097g/T097h. | OPC-10000-6 section 5.2 Binary encoding; OPC-10000-6 section 5.2.5 Arrays; OPC-10000-4 section 7.38.2 Common StatusCodes. |
| Count arithmetic overflow | TBD: `tests/fixtures/audit-hardening/malformed-array/count-overflow.bin` | Prove positive counts that overflow element-size or reader-position arithmetic are rejected before read/skip/storage. | Binary decoder rejects with `Bad_DecodingError`; later service-specific capacity tests may document a more specific StatusCode after successful decoding. | FR-003, FR-020 | T011c, T015a, T015c, T022b; fuzz evidence T087a and T097a/T097b. | OPC-10000-6 section 5.2 Binary encoding; OPC-10000-6 section 5.2.5 Arrays; OPC-10000-4 section 7.38.2 Common StatusCodes. |
| FindServers malformed array | TBD: `tests/fixtures/audit-hardening/malformed-array/findservers-count-below-minus-one.bin` | Exercise a service request array field using the shared malformed-array policy. | Reject request with `Bad_DecodingError`; no filters are applied and no service state changes. | FR-001, FR-003, FR-020 | T024a, T033b, T042a/T042b. | OPC-10000-4 section 5.5.2.2 FindServers parameters; OPC-10000-6 section 5.2.5 Arrays; OPC-10000-4 section 7.38.2 Common StatusCodes. |
| GetEndpoints malformed array | TBD: `tests/fixtures/audit-hardening/malformed-array/getendpoints-count-below-minus-one.bin` | Exercise a GetEndpoints request array field using the shared malformed-array policy. | Reject request with `Bad_DecodingError`; no endpoint filter matching proceeds from malformed data. | FR-001, FR-003, FR-020 | T024c, T033d, T042a/T042b. | OPC-10000-4 section 5.5.4.2 GetEndpoints parameters; OPC-10000-6 section 5.2.5 Arrays; OPC-10000-4 section 7.38.2 Common StatusCodes. |
| Binary-reader fuzz seeds | TBD: `tests/fixtures/audit-hardening/malformed-array/fuzz-binary-reader-array-boundaries/` | Provide later corpus seeds for below-`-1`, truncated, and overflow array boundaries. | Fuzz smoke has no crash, timeout, OOM, sanitizer finding, or silent-success regression; invalid seeds should exercise `Bad_DecodingError` paths when asserted by the harness. | FR-001, FR-003, FR-020 | T022a, T022b, T087a, T087d, T097a/T097b, T097g/T097h. | OPC-10000-6 section 5.2 Binary encoding; OPC-10000-6 section 5.2.5 Arrays; OPC-10000-4 section 7.38.2 Common StatusCodes. |

## Malformed-ExtensionObject Fixture Index

Purpose: track the planned ExtensionObject boundary fixtures needed to prove
declared body lengths, encoding selectors, bounded subreaders, and bounded skip
behavior before payload bytes exist. This section supports FR-003 and FR-020
from `specs/020-audit-hardening/spec.md`, with service examples that also
exercise the no-state-mutation expectations from User Story 1.

Primary citations:

- OPC-10000-6 section 5.2 Binary encoding.
- OPC-10000-6 section 5.2.2.15 ExtensionObject.
- OPC-10000-4 section 7.38.2 Common StatusCodes.

| Category | Planned fixture path | Purpose | Expected behavior / StatusCode | Related FRs | Target tests / tasks | OPC UA citations |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| No-body control | TBD: `tests/fixtures/audit-hardening/malformed-extensionobject/no-body-control.bin` | Preserve the valid ExtensionObject encoding with no body as a RED/GREEN control for malformed body fixtures. | Valid control: decode as an ExtensionObject with no body; no `Bad_DecodingError`. | FR-003, FR-020 | T012a/T012b contrast coverage; later binary ExtensionObject decoder regression coverage. | OPC-10000-6 section 5.2 Binary encoding; OPC-10000-6 section 5.2.2.15 ExtensionObject. |
| Declared body overrun | TBD: `tests/fixtures/audit-hardening/malformed-extensionobject/declared-body-overrun.bin` | Prove a ByteString-encoded ExtensionObject body length cannot exceed the remaining reader body. | Reject with `Bad_DecodingError` (`0x80070000`); no bytes are read, skipped, stored, or exposed beyond the declared message body. | FR-003, FR-020 | T012a, T013a, T013b, T022b; fuzz evidence T087d and T097g/T097h. | OPC-10000-6 section 5.2 Binary encoding; OPC-10000-6 section 5.2.2.15 ExtensionObject; OPC-10000-4 section 7.38.2 Common StatusCodes. |
| Declared body underrun | TBD: `tests/fixtures/audit-hardening/malformed-extensionobject/declared-body-underrun.bin` | Prove an ExtensionObject body shorter than the encoded fields required by its decoded type fails inside the bounded subreader. | Reject with `Bad_DecodingError`; the outer reader does not continue from partially decoded typed data. | FR-003, FR-020 | T012b, T013a; binary types fuzz evidence T087d and T097g/T097h. | OPC-10000-6 section 5.2 Binary encoding; OPC-10000-6 section 5.2.2.15 ExtensionObject; OPC-10000-4 section 7.38.2 Common StatusCodes. |
| Invalid encoding selector | TBD: `tests/fixtures/audit-hardening/malformed-extensionobject/invalid-encoding-selector.bin` | Prove ExtensionObject encoding selector values outside the no-body, ByteString, or XmlElement forms are rejected deterministically. | Reject with `Bad_DecodingError`; decoder status remains failed and no service callback receives the invalid object. | FR-003, FR-020 | Later `tests/unit/test_binary_extension_object_errors.c` decoder coverage; T022b; binary types fuzz evidence T087d and T097g/T097h. | OPC-10000-6 section 5.2.2.15 ExtensionObject; OPC-10000-4 section 7.38.2 Common StatusCodes. |
| Body skip overflow | TBD: `tests/fixtures/audit-hardening/malformed-extensionobject/body-skip-overflow.bin` | Prove skip logic for an unknown or uninterpreted ExtensionObject body validates declared length before advancing the reader. | Reject with `Bad_DecodingError`; skip arithmetic cannot wrap or advance past the available body. | FR-003, FR-020 | T013b, T015c, T022b; fuzz evidence T087d and T097g/T097h. | OPC-10000-6 section 5.2 Binary encoding; OPC-10000-6 section 5.2.2.15 ExtensionObject; OPC-10000-4 section 7.38.2 Common StatusCodes. |
| ActivateSession identity overrun | TBD: `tests/fixtures/audit-hardening/malformed-extensionobject/activatesession-user-identity-overrun.bin` | Exercise the ActivateSession `userIdentityToken` ExtensionObject with a body length that exceeds the remaining request body. | Reject request with `Bad_DecodingError`; no user identity is accepted and no Session activation state changes. | FR-003, FR-020 | T026, T035, T042c/T042d; ActivateSession fuzz evidence T087c and T097e/T097f. | OPC-10000-4 section 5.7.3 ActivateSession; OPC-10000-6 section 5.2.2.15 ExtensionObject; OPC-10000-4 section 7.38.2 Common StatusCodes. |
| HistoryRead details truncation | TBD: `tests/fixtures/audit-hardening/malformed-extensionobject/historyread-details-truncated.bin` | Exercise the HistoryRead details ExtensionObject with a bounded body that is shorter than the required decoded fields. | Reject request with `Bad_DecodingError`; no HistoryRead processing or history state mutation proceeds from partial details. | FR-002, FR-003, FR-020 | T032, T041, T042o/T042p. | OPC-10000-4 section 5.11.3.2 HistoryRead parameters; OPC-10000-6 section 5.2.2.15 ExtensionObject; OPC-10000-4 section 7.38.2 Common StatusCodes. |
| Binary-types fuzz seeds | TBD: `tests/fixtures/audit-hardening/malformed-extensionobject/fuzz-binary-types-extensionobject-boundaries/` | Provide later corpus seeds for overrun, underrun, invalid-selector, and skip-overflow ExtensionObject boundaries. | Fuzz smoke has no crash, timeout, OOM, sanitizer finding, or silent-success regression; invalid seeds should exercise `Bad_DecodingError` paths when asserted by the harness. | FR-003, FR-020 | T012a/T012b, T022b, T087d, T097g/T097h; later `tests/fuzz/fuzz_binary_types.c` corpus coverage. | OPC-10000-6 section 5.2 Binary encoding; OPC-10000-6 section 5.2.2.15 ExtensionObject; OPC-10000-4 section 7.38.2 Common StatusCodes. |

## Malformed-MessageChunk Fixture Index

Purpose: track the planned OPC UA TCP MessageChunk fixtures needed to prove
message type, chunk type/finality, declared message size, body completeness, and
negotiated-size handling before payload bytes exist. This section supports
FR-003, FR-010, and FR-020 from `specs/020-audit-hardening/spec.md`, with
coverage targets from `docs/traceability/020-audit-hardening.md`.

Primary citations:

- OPC-10000-6 section 6.7.2 MessageChunk.
- OPC-10000-6 section 7.1.2.2 Message Header.
- OPC-10000-6 sections 7.1.2.3 Hello Message and 7.1.2.4 Acknowledge Message for negotiated limits.
- OPC-10000-4 section 7.38.2 Common StatusCodes.

| Category | Planned fixture path | Purpose | Expected behavior / StatusCode | Related FRs | Target tests / tasks | OPC UA citations |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Invalid TCP message type | TBD: `tests/fixtures/audit-hardening/malformed-messagechunk/invalid-message-type.bin` | Prove unknown or unsupported three-byte MessageType values are rejected before SecureChannel or service dispatch. | Emit a TCP Error carrying `Bad_TcpMessageTypeInvalid` (`0x807E0000`); no service body dispatch, callback, or protocol state mutation. | FR-010, FR-020 | T007m/T008m/T009m status coverage; T018a, T019a, T023a; fuzz evidence T087b and T097c/T097d. | OPC-10000-6 section 6.7.2 MessageChunk; OPC-10000-6 section 7.1.2.2 Message Header; OPC-10000-4 section 7.38.2 Common StatusCodes. |
| Abort chunk | TBD: `tests/fixtures/audit-hardening/malformed-messagechunk/abort-chunk.bin` | Prove an inbound abort chunk is handled as an aborted message and never as a complete service request. | TCP Error/no-dispatch path asserted by T018b; no service body decode, callback, session/channel side effect, or request completion. | FR-003, FR-010, FR-020 | T018b, T019b, T023b; fuzz evidence T087b and T097c/T097d. | OPC-10000-6 section 6.7.2 MessageChunk; OPC-10000-4 section 7.38.2 Common StatusCodes. |
| Non-final continuation chunk | TBD: `tests/fixtures/audit-hardening/malformed-messagechunk/non-final-continuation-chunk.bin` | Prove a non-final chunk is not dispatched in single-chunk operation unless reassembly is later implemented and claimed. | TCP Error/no-dispatch path asserted by T018c; no partial body exposure, callback, or state mutation. | FR-003, FR-010, FR-020 | T018c, T019c, T023c; fuzz evidence T087b and T097c/T097d. | OPC-10000-6 section 6.7.2 MessageChunk; OPC-10000-4 section 7.38.2 Common StatusCodes. |
| Truncated message header | TBD: `tests/fixtures/audit-hardening/malformed-messagechunk/truncated-message-header.bin` | Prove fewer bytes than the MessageHeader requires are never parsed as a complete chunk. | Reject or keep incomplete without dispatch; if surfaced as malformed input, report `Bad_DecodingError` or a TCP Error and leave protocol state unchanged. | FR-003, FR-020 | Later `tests/unit/test_message_chunk_errors.c` header-boundary coverage; T023d; fuzz evidence T087b and T097c/T097d. | OPC-10000-6 section 6.7.2 MessageChunk; OPC-10000-6 section 7.1.2.2 Message Header; OPC-10000-4 section 7.38.2 Common StatusCodes. |
| Declared size below header | TBD: `tests/fixtures/audit-hardening/malformed-messagechunk/declared-size-below-header.bin` | Prove a MessageSize smaller than the required MessageHeader or chunk header cannot underflow body-length calculations. | Reject with `Bad_DecodingError` or TCP Error before body parsing; no reader-position wrap, callback, or state mutation. | FR-003, FR-020 | Later `tests/unit/test_message_chunk_errors.c` size-boundary coverage; T023d; fuzz evidence T087b and T097c/T097d. | OPC-10000-6 section 6.7.2 MessageChunk; OPC-10000-6 section 7.1.2.2 Message Header; OPC-10000-4 section 7.38.2 Common StatusCodes. |
| Declared body truncation | TBD: `tests/fixtures/audit-hardening/malformed-messagechunk/declared-size-truncated-body.bin` | Prove a chunk whose MessageSize exceeds the bytes actually available is never treated as a complete service body. | Reject or keep incomplete without dispatch; if the fixture is forced through the parser, fail with `Bad_DecodingError`/TCP Error and no state mutation. | FR-003, FR-020 | T016a/T016b service-body contrast; T023d; fuzz evidence T087b and T097c/T097d. | OPC-10000-6 section 6.7.2 MessageChunk; OPC-10000-6 section 7.1.2.2 Message Header; OPC-10000-4 section 7.38.2 Common StatusCodes. |
| Negotiated size at limit | TBD: `tests/fixtures/audit-hardening/malformed-messagechunk/negotiated-size-at-limit.bin` | Preserve the exact negotiated receive/message-size boundary as a valid control for over-limit fixtures. | Valid control: accept the complete final chunk at the negotiated limit and dispatch only after full body validation. | FR-003, FR-020 | T020a/T021a negotiation contrast; T023d; fuzz evidence T087b and T097c/T097d. | OPC-10000-6 section 6.7.2 MessageChunk; OPC-10000-6 section 7.1.2.2 Message Header; OPC-10000-6 sections 7.1.2.3 and 7.1.2.4 negotiated limits. |
| Negotiated size exceeded | TBD: `tests/fixtures/audit-hardening/malformed-messagechunk/negotiated-size-exceeded.bin` | Prove inbound MessageSize values larger than the negotiated or configured receive limit are rejected deterministically. | Emit a TCP Error such as `Bad_TcpMessageTooLarge` (`0x80800000`) before body decode or dispatch; no state mutation. | FR-003, FR-020 | T020b/T021b negotiation rejection; T023d; fuzz evidence T087b and T097c/T097d. | OPC-10000-6 section 6.7.2 MessageChunk; OPC-10000-6 section 7.1.2.2 Message Header; OPC-10000-6 sections 7.1.2.3 and 7.1.2.4 negotiated limits; OPC-10000-4 section 7.38.2 Common StatusCodes. |
| Message-chunk fuzz seeds | TBD: `tests/fixtures/audit-hardening/malformed-messagechunk/fuzz-message-chunk-boundaries/` | Provide later corpus seeds for invalid MessageType, abort, non-final, truncated, and negotiated-size boundaries. | Fuzz smoke has no crash, timeout, OOM, sanitizer finding, silent success, or service-body dispatch from invalid chunks. | FR-003, FR-010, FR-020 | T023a, T023b, T023c, T023d; fuzz evidence T087b and T097c/T097d; later `tests/fuzz/fuzz_message_chunk.c` corpus coverage. | OPC-10000-6 section 6.7.2 MessageChunk; OPC-10000-6 section 7.1.2.2 Message Header; OPC-10000-4 section 7.38.2 Common StatusCodes. |

## Malformed-Session Fixture Index

Purpose: track the planned Session service fixtures needed to prove
CreateSession, ActivateSession, activation state, channel binding, user identity,
and exact StatusCode behavior before payload bytes exist. This section supports
FR-002, FR-003, FR-005, FR-006, FR-007, FR-008, and FR-020 from
`specs/020-audit-hardening/spec.md`.

Primary citations:

- OPC-10000-4 section 5.7.2 CreateSession.
- OPC-10000-4 section 5.7.3 ActivateSession.
- OPC-10000-4 section 7.38.2 Common StatusCodes.

| Category | Planned fixture path | Purpose | Expected behavior / StatusCode | Related FRs | Target tests / tasks | OPC UA citations |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| CreateSession truncated body | TBD: `tests/fixtures/audit-hardening/malformed-session/createsession-truncated-body.bin` | Prove CreateSession mandatory request fields are fully decoded before allocating a Session or returning identifiers. | Reject with `Bad_DecodingError` (`0x80070000`); no Session, authentication token, server nonce, or application-visible state is created. | FR-002, FR-003, FR-020 | T016a/T016b dispatch completeness contrast; T025, T034, T042c/T042d; later `tests/unit/test_session.c` fixture coverage. | OPC-10000-4 section 5.7.2 CreateSession; OPC-10000-4 section 7.38.2 Common StatusCodes; OPC-10000-6 section 5.2 Binary encoding. |
| CreateSession session-token freshness | TBD: `tests/fixtures/audit-hardening/malformed-session/createsession-token-freshness-control.bin` | Preserve a fixture plan for proving Session identifiers and authentication tokens are not fixed, predictable, or reused across Sessions. | Two successful CreateSession flows produce distinct security-sensitive identifiers; entropy failure cases fail closed instead of returning deterministic material. | FR-005, FR-020 | T044a, T050a, T050b, T055c/T055d; later `tests/unit/test_session.c` multi-session coverage. | OPC-10000-4 section 5.7.2 CreateSession; OPC-10000-4 section 7.38.2 Common StatusCodes. |
| CreateSession nonce entropy failure | TBD: `tests/fixtures/audit-hardening/malformed-session/createsession-server-nonce-entropy-failure.bin` | Prove server nonce generation fails closed when freshness cannot be provided. | Reject CreateSession with `Bad_SecurityChecksFailed`; no Session is activated or left with a predictable nonce. | FR-005, FR-020 | T044b, T050c, T055c/T055d; later `tests/unit/test_session.c` entropy-adapter coverage. | OPC-10000-4 section 5.7.2 CreateSession; OPC-10000-4 section 7.38.2 Common StatusCodes. |
| ActivateSession client proof boundary | TBD: `tests/fixtures/audit-hardening/malformed-session/activatesession-client-proof-boundary.bin` | Prove ActivateSession rejects missing, truncated, or mismatched client proof/certificate-related activation data without activating the Session. | Reject with `Bad_SecurityChecksFailed` or the task-specific security StatusCode once the proof rule is implemented; Session remains inactive. | FR-005, FR-006, FR-020 | T026 boundary contrast; T035, T055c/T055d; ActivateSession fuzz evidence T087c and T097e/T097f. | OPC-10000-4 section 5.7.3 ActivateSession; OPC-10000-4 section 7.38.2 Common StatusCodes. |
| ActivateSession user identity overrun | TBD: `tests/fixtures/audit-hardening/malformed-session/activatesession-user-identity-overrun.bin` | Track the Session-level fixture for a `userIdentityToken` ExtensionObject whose declared body exceeds the remaining ActivateSession body. | Reject with `Bad_DecodingError`; no user identity is accepted and no activation state changes. | FR-003, FR-008, FR-020 | T026, T035, T042c/T042d; `tests/unit/test_security_identity_errors.c`; ActivateSession fuzz evidence T087c and T097e/T097f. | OPC-10000-4 section 5.7.3 ActivateSession; OPC-10000-4 section 7.38.2 Common StatusCodes; OPC-10000-6 section 5.2.2.15 ExtensionObject. |
| Inactive Session service use | TBD: `tests/fixtures/audit-hardening/malformed-session/inactive-session-service-use.bin` | Prove a known Session token cannot be used for session-bound services before ActivateSession succeeds. | Reject with `Bad_SessionNotActivated`; do not collapse this case into `Bad_SessionIdInvalid`. | FR-006, FR-007, FR-020 | T046a, T052a, T055c/T055d; `tests/unit/test_service_state_errors.c`; service-body contrast T016a/T016b. | OPC-10000-4 section 5.7.2 CreateSession; OPC-10000-4 section 5.7.3 ActivateSession; OPC-10000-4 section 7.38.2 Common StatusCodes. |
| Unknown Session token | TBD: `tests/fixtures/audit-hardening/malformed-session/unknown-session-token.bin` | Prove an invalid or unknown Session identity is distinguished from a known but inactive Session. | Reject with `Bad_SessionIdInvalid`; no Session state, SecureChannel binding, or service callback is consumed. | FR-006, FR-007, FR-020 | T046b, T052b, T055c/T055d; `tests/unit/test_service_state_errors.c`; dispatch contrast T064/T073. | OPC-10000-4 section 5.7.2 CreateSession; OPC-10000-4 section 7.38.2 Common StatusCodes. |
| Cross-channel ActivateSession | TBD: `tests/fixtures/audit-hardening/malformed-session/cross-channel-activatesession.bin` | Prove a Session created on one SecureChannel cannot be activated on a different SecureChannel. | Reject ActivateSession with `Bad_SecureChannelIdInvalid`; original Session remains unactivated and bound to its creating channel. | FR-006, FR-007, FR-020 | T045a, T051a, T051b, T055e/T055f; `tests/unit/test_connection_multiplex.c`. | OPC-10000-4 section 5.7.2 CreateSession; OPC-10000-4 section 5.7.3 ActivateSession; OPC-10000-4 section 7.38.2 Common StatusCodes. |
| Cross-channel session-bound service | TBD: `tests/fixtures/audit-hardening/malformed-session/cross-channel-session-bound-service.bin` | Prove an activated Session cannot be reused from the wrong SecureChannel for later session-bound services. | Reject with `Bad_SecureChannelIdInvalid`; no service handler executes under the stolen or replayed token. | FR-006, FR-007, FR-020 | T045b, T051a, T051c, T055e/T055f; `tests/unit/test_connection_multiplex.c`; dispatch contrast T016a/T016b. | OPC-10000-4 section 5.7.2 CreateSession; OPC-10000-4 section 5.7.3 ActivateSession; OPC-10000-4 section 7.38.2 Common StatusCodes. |
| SecurityPolicy None username activation | TBD: `tests/fixtures/audit-hardening/malformed-session/securitypolicy-none-username-activation.bin` | Prove plaintext username/password identity tokens are not accepted over `SecurityPolicy#None` by default. | Reject activation with `Bad_IdentityTokenRejected`; Session does not become active for username/password credentials over None. | FR-008, FR-020 | T047b, T053, T055g/T055h; `tests/unit/test_security_identity_errors.c`; `tests/integration/test_user_auth_plaintext.c` T048a/T048b. | OPC-10000-4 section 5.7.3 ActivateSession; OPC-10000-4 section 7.38.2 Common StatusCodes. |
| SecurityPolicy None username advertisement | TBD: `tests/fixtures/audit-hardening/malformed-session/securitypolicy-none-username-advertisement.bin` | Track endpoint-advertisement evidence that plaintext username/password policies are absent for `SecurityPolicy#None` by default. | GetEndpoints does not advertise username/password tokens for SecurityPolicy None; anonymous interoperability remains separately testable. | FR-008, FR-020 | T047a, T048a, T048b, T054, T055g/T055h; `tests/unit/test_security_identity_errors.c`; `tests/integration/test_user_auth_plaintext.c`. | OPC-10000-4 section 5.7.3 ActivateSession; OPC-10000-4 section 7.38.2 Common StatusCodes. |
| Session StatusCode matrix | TBD: `tests/fixtures/audit-hardening/malformed-session/session-statuscode-matrix.yaml` | Provide a later sidecar index mapping malformed Session preconditions to exact expected StatusCodes for regression tests and documentation checks. | Matrix rows distinguish `Bad_DecodingError`, `Bad_SecurityChecksFailed`, `Bad_SecureChannelIdInvalid`, `Bad_SessionNotActivated`, `Bad_SessionIdInvalid`, and `Bad_IdentityTokenRejected` according to the request precondition. | FR-002, FR-005, FR-006, FR-007, FR-008, FR-020 | T007a/T007g/T007h/T007i/T007j/T007k status tests; T025, T026, T043-T048b; T076a/T076b documentation consistency. | OPC-10000-4 section 5.7.2 CreateSession; OPC-10000-4 section 5.7.3 ActivateSession; OPC-10000-4 section 7.38.2 Common StatusCodes. |
| ActivateSession fuzz seeds | TBD: `tests/fixtures/audit-hardening/malformed-session/fuzz-activatesession-boundaries/` | Provide later corpus seeds for malformed activation state, channel binding, proof, and user identity token boundaries. | Fuzz smoke has no crash, timeout, OOM, sanitizer finding, silent activation, or wrong-channel service dispatch from invalid activation inputs. | FR-003, FR-006, FR-008, FR-020 | T026, T035, T045a/T045b, T047b; fuzz evidence T087c and T097e/T097f; later ActivateSession fuzz harness coverage. | OPC-10000-4 section 5.7.3 ActivateSession; OPC-10000-4 section 7.38.2 Common StatusCodes; OPC-10000-6 section 5.2.2.15 ExtensionObject. |

## Malformed-Filter Fixture Index

Purpose: track the planned MonitoringFilter, AggregateFilter, and ContentFilter
fixtures needed to prove unsupported, invalid, disallowed, malformed, and
overflow filter behavior before payload bytes exist. This section supports
FR-003, FR-013, FR-014, FR-017, and FR-020 from
`specs/020-audit-hardening/spec.md`.

Primary citations:

- OPC-10000-4 section 5.13.2.4 CreateMonitoredItems parameters.
- OPC-10000-4 section 5.13.3.4 ModifyMonitoredItems parameters.
- OPC-10000-4 section 7.22.1 MonitoringFilter.
- OPC-10000-4 section 7.22.4 AggregateFilter.
- OPC-10000-4 sections B.2.3 and 7.7.1 QueryFirst and ContentFilter semantics.
- OPC-10000-4 section 7.38.2 Common StatusCodes.
- OPC-10000-13 sections 5.4.3.5 Average, 5.4.3.10 Minimum, and 5.4.3.11 Maximum.

| CreateMonitoredItems unsupported MonitoringFilter type | TBD: `tests/fixtures/audit-hardening/malformed-filter/create-unsupported-monitoring-filter.bin` | Prove an ExtensionObject filter type outside the supported MonitoringFilter set is rejected per item and does not enable unsupported subscription behavior. | Per-item result reports `Bad_MonitoredItemFilterUnsupported`; monitored item creation for that request item does not silently succeed. | FR-013, FR-020 | T007b/T008b/T009b status coverage; T058a, T067a, T074c/T074d; subscription filter fuzz evidence T087e and T097i/T097j. | OPC-10000-4 section 5.13.2.4 CreateMonitoredItems parameters; OPC-10000-4 section 7.22.1 MonitoringFilter; OPC-10000-4 section 7.38.2 Common StatusCodes. |

## Truncated-Service-Body Fixture Index

Purpose: track the planned mandatory request-body truncation fixtures needed to
prove service dispatch and service-specific decoders reject incomplete bodies
before payload bytes exist. This section supports FR-002, FR-003, and FR-020
from `specs/020-audit-hardening/spec.md` across the core supported audit
surface: Discovery, Session, Read, Write, Browse, Subscription, Query, and
History examples where tasks exist.

Primary citations:

- OPC-10000-4 section 7.38.2 Common StatusCodes.
- OPC-10000-4 service parameter sections named in each row.
- OPC-10000-6 section 5.2 Binary encoding only where the row covers encoded
  body or length boundaries.

| Category | Planned fixture path | Purpose | Expected behavior / StatusCode | Related FRs | Target tests / tasks | OPC UA citations |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Dispatch mandatory body prefix | TBD: `tests/fixtures/audit-hardening/truncated-service-body/dispatch-mandatory-body-prefix.bin` | Prove the shared dispatcher rejects a request that contains only a service header or an incomplete mandatory body before selecting a service callback. | Truncated mandatory service bodies reject with `Bad_DecodingError`; no service callback or state mutation occurs before any service-specific side effects. | FR-002, FR-003, FR-020 | T016a, T016b, T017; dispatch validation T074o/T074p. | OPC-10000-4 section 7.38.2 Common StatusCodes; OPC-10000-6 section 5.2 Binary encoding. |
| FindServers truncated mandatory body | TBD: `tests/fixtures/audit-hardening/truncated-service-body/findservers-truncated-body.bin` | Prove FindServers request parameters are complete before endpoint URL, locale, server URI, or server type filters are decoded or applied. | Truncated mandatory service bodies reject with `Bad_DecodingError`; no service callback or state mutation occurs before any service-specific side effects. | FR-002, FR-003, FR-011, FR-020 | T024b, T033a, T042a/T042b; filter behavior contrast T056a-T056d and T065a-T065d/T074a/T074b. | OPC-10000-4 section 5.5.2.2 FindServers parameters; OPC-10000-4 section 7.38.2 Common StatusCodes; OPC-10000-6 section 5.2 Binary encoding. |
